_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data visualization best practices, including chart type selection, cognitive load principles, color accessibility, and the difference between exploratory and explanatory visualization.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.332), AG-K-001 (AG, cosine: 0.313).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.260). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, diagram, evaluate, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessibility, best, chart, cognitive, color, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.888, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Ability to evaluate network diagram" and "Knowledge of data visualization best practices, including chart type selection," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.336 > STS 0.260 (gap +0.076). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, diagram, evaluate, network]. WIDAI terms: [accessibility, best, chart, cognitive, color, data].
